summary: Backend testing completed for Smart Scheduling Session Management and Student Assignments APIs. All 15 tests passed (1 skipped due to missing student account). All new APIs are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All session management APIs (PUT, DELETE, SWAP) are properly implemented with Arabic/English messages
Student assignments API correctly requires student role (returns 403 for non-students)
SmartTimetablePage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Edit mode in SmartTimetablePage allows clicking sessions to modify teacher
Execution status dialog (نافذة حالة التنفيذ) properly shows after timetable generation with 'عرض الجدول الكامل' button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing timetables (12 timetables, 60 sessions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All session management APIs tested and working. Student assignments API requires student role which doesn't exist yet (student@nassaq.com account not created). The API structure is correct and returns proper 403 for non-student users.

tests: Update with empty body - SUCCESS (no changes)
API exists and requires student role - Returns 403 for principal
GET /api/student-portal/assignments.note: MOCKED - Student assignments use mock data when no real data exists. Student account (student@nassaq.com) not created yet.

features: Edit mode toggle button with data-testid='edit-mode-btn'
Sessions become clickable in edit mode
Shows success rate with progress bar

mocked_apis_list: Student assignments fallback to mock data if no real data exists
